title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 277.141 - Warranties of merchantability or fitness to be in writing
text:
277.141.  Warranties of merchantability or fitness to be in writing. — If a contract for the sale of livestock does not contain a written statement as to a warranty of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose, the seller is not liable for damages resulting from the lack of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose of the livestock sold under the terms of that contract.
(L. 1980 H.B. 972)
